stories.title: Core Tools Batch 1: Agent, WebFetch, WebSearch, AskUser
acceptanceCriteria: AgentTool spawns a goroutine running its own QueryEngine with isolated context, supports model/run_in_background params
WebFetchTool fetches URLs via net/http, converts HTML to markdown (using html-to-markdown or regex), returns content
WebSearchTool delegates to Anthropic server-side web_search tool via API, returns results with URLs
AskUserQuestionTool passes questions through and returns answers from permission check (pass-through pattern)
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Core Tools Batch 2: TodoWrite, ToolSearch, Config, Sleep
acceptanceCriteria: TodoWriteTool manages a todo list in AppState, supports status updates, clears when all complete
ToolSearchTool implements keyword scoring (name match +10, hint match +4, desc match +2) and select: mode
ConfigTool reads/writes settings.json values by dotted key path
SleepTool sleeps for specified duration with context cancellation support
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Task Tools: Create, Get, Update, List, Stop, Output
acceptanceCriteria: TaskCreateTool creates a task in AppState with generated ID and returns task info
TaskGetTool retrieves task state by ID from AppState
TaskUpdateTool updates task status/description in AppState
TaskListTool returns all tasks with status filtering
TaskStopTool kills a running task by ID
TaskOutputTool reads task output from disk file
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Orchestration Tools: Skill, Plan, Worktree, Team
acceptanceCriteria: SkillTool loads and executes skill markdown files from .claude/skills/ directory
EnterPlanModeTool/ExitPlanModeTool toggle plan mode flag in AppState
EnterWorktreeTool creates a git worktree, ExitWorktreeTool cleans it up
TeamCreateTool/TeamDeleteTool/SendMessageTool manage team state and inter-agent messaging
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Remaining Tools: Notebook, MCP, Cron, Brief, PowerShell, REPL, etc.
acceptanceCriteria: NotebookEditTool parses/edits .ipynb JSON (replace/insert/delete cells)
MCPTool/ListMcpResources/ReadMcpResource/McpAuth delegate to MCP client
CronTools create/list/delete scheduled tasks
BriefTool toggles brief output mode
PowerShellTool executes PowerShell commands (Windows-aware)
REPLTool runs code in a persistent REPL session
RemoteTriggerTool/SyntheticOutputTool implemented
go build ./... succeeds

stories.title: Advanced Services: Analytics, Plugin System, Bridge
acceptanceCriteria: pkg/services/analytics/ implements event logging with telemetry sink
pkg/services/plugins/ implements plugin loading, discovery, and management
pkg/services/bridge/ implements remote session bridge with WebSocket transport
go build ./... succeeds
